action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 10, DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut trained successfully and achieved a new high Val AUC of 0.7686. The eval failed because it tried to evaluate the broken DKT_TargetEmb model from iteration 9. Analysis: I will submit an eval for the successful DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut model. Meanwhile, I will implement a new architecture, DKT_TargetAttention, which uses a GRU to process the sequence and then applies MultiheadAttention over the past GRU hidden states, queried by the target skill embedding. This combines the strengths of RNNs and Attention. Decision: Copy the best checkpoint to dkt_deepout.pt and submit it for eval. Write the new model and train DKT_TargetAttention for 20 epochs.
action.command: cp checkpoints/best.pt checkpoints/dkt_deepout.pt && python train.py --model DKT_TargetAttention --epochs 20
